 104:         """Moves a tile in the minimax algorithm then calls minimax_piece."""
 105:         # We don't evaluate the game state after a piece move because the depth is only decreased after a tile move, which is the end of a turn.
 106:         # So we only evaluate the game state at the end of a turn, which is more efficient.
